name: Pitborne

abilities.name: Black Blood
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage, enemy models within (melee)1" gain an Injured token.

abilities.name: Birthright
abilities.text: While this model has a Glutted token it may declare the Interact action while engaged or if it left engagement with a Walk action. After ignoring either restriction in this way, remove a Glutted token from this model.

actions.name: From the Pits
actions.effects: Summon a Terror Tot into base contact with the target.

extraction_notes: Card grants abilities to 'Friendly Brood models' and an action to 'Friendly unique Brood models'
Black Blood has a specific range indicator (melee)1" which represents melee range at 1 inch
From the Pits is a signature action (♦ symbol indicates this)
Terror Tot is a model type summoned by the action
